chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-1062 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 23-5-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Altaf Shah, Advocate is holding brief for Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for the petitioners on the ground that the latter is busy before another Bench. Comments have been filed by respondent No.02, through AAG and Mr. Altaf Shah Advocate, after gone through the same, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. In view of above, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Naveed Ali
